title: Enakkoru Aasai Lyrics Aasai
stanzas:
Enakkoru Aasai Lyrics Aasai Album
TeeJay ft Pragathi Guruprasad

Enakkoru aasai
Enakkoru aasai
Enakkoru aasai irukku (2)

pesi pazhagi
paathu purinjakanum
pudicha appuram
kadhalikkonum.

muththam koduthu
kaalam pooraa anachikanum
en aasai avala.

Enakkoru aasai
Enakkoru aasai
Enakkoru aasai irukku (2)

avala kandeney
ava vera yaarum illa
neethaan.
edam pudicha manasula
aasa aasa vachchiruthen
adha eppodhum
vachchiruppen.

adho engae oduthu aadu
aathoramaa unkooda naan.
vetkamvittu aasaiya veesa
manasum thayanguthe.

kadhal mudhal sonnadhu yaaru
kelvi kaetu kaathirunthom
bayam illaama nenja nimithi

kanava idhu
nejamaa idhu
killi paathum kaetten.
Enakkoru aasai irukku

un aasai ellaam
saamikitta solliten
sollaiyaa.

manja thaali ava
kazhuthula mudichikka
aasa kattividavaa
aasa aasa vachchiruthen
adha eppavum
vachchiruppen.

paasakaaran unmadiyil
vizhundhu kadhaigal
solluven.

unna pola oru
chinna paappaa
peththu tharuviyaa maa
illanuthaan sonnaa
paavam paiyaan thaanguvenaa?

kenji kaetta
konji kaetta
kaiyya pudichi kaettiye

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Enakkoru Aasai?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the desire to connect with a loved one.

In which movie does Enakkoru Aasai appear?

The movie is currently unknown, but the song is part of the album Aasai.

Who are the singers of Enakkoru Aasai?

The song features vocals by TeeJay and Pragathi Guruprasad.

When was Enakkoru Aasai released?

The song was published on March 31, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Enakkoru Aasai encapsulates the feelings of yearning and affection that come with love. It conveys a sense of nostalgia and romantic longing, making it perfect for intimate moments. The lyrics reflect a desire to understand and connect with a beloved, evoking emotions that many can relate to. Overall, this melody serves as a beautiful reminder of the complexities of love and desire.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enakkoru Aasai is a heartfelt melody that beautifully captures the essence of longing and desire. With its soothing lyrics and enchanting tune, this song resonates with anyone who has ever experienced love. The collaboration between TeeJay and Pragathi Guruprasad brings a unique charm that makes it a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: I have a desire, I have a desire, I have a desire.
I need to talk, understand by looking, and then fall in love.
I want to give a kiss and let time pass, my desire is her.
I have a desire, I have a desire, I have a desire.
I see her, there is no one else, only you. I have placed my desires in my heart and I always keep them there.
That is where I dance and play with you. Leaving aside shame, my heart is filled with desire.
Who asked about love first? We waited without fear, if the heart speaks the truth.
Is this dream real? I have seen it even in a dream.
I told all your desires to God, did I?
I have placed my desires in her hair, will she tie it up? I always keep them there.
I will tell stories while falling into the depths of love.
Will you give birth to a little child like you or not? If you say no, will I bear the burden?
I asked and got a response, holding hands and asking.
I have a desire, I have a desire, I have a desire.
I need to talk, understand by looking, and then fall in love.
I want to give a kiss and let time pass, my desire is him.
I have a desire, I have a desire, I have a desire for her.
